en.extract:
The blue jewel-babbler (Ptilorrhoa caerulescens) is a species of bird in the family Cinclosomatidae, endemic to New Guinea.
In Wampar, spoken among the people who live in Markham Valley of New Guinea, it is referred to as the birisis. Its natural habitat is tropical moist lowland rainforests, typically primary rather than secondary forests. 


Vocal behaviour
Its call consists of a series of rapid notes at a constant pitch; it starts loud and gets progressively louder.


Subspecies
Source:

P. c. caerulescens
P. c. neumanni
P. c. nigricrissus
P. c. geislerorum


References

The '''blue jewel-babbler''' ('''''Ptilorrhoa caerulescens''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Cinclosomatidae]], [[endemism|endemic]] to [[New Guinea]].

In [[Wampar language|Wampar]], spoken among the people who live in [[Markham Valley]] of New Guinea, it is referred to as the birisis.<ref>{{Citation |last1=Fischer |first1=Hans |title=English–Wampar Finder List |date=2021-12-09 |work=Wampar–English Dictionary with an English–Wampar finder list |pages=287–345 |publisher=ANU Press |last2=Beer |first2=Bettina|doi=10.22459/wed.2021.03 |doi-access=free |isbn=978-1-76046-478-3 |hdl=1885/258970 |hdl-access=free }}</ref> Its natural [[habitat]] is tropical moist lowland [[rainforest]]s, typically primary rather than secondary forests.<ref>{{Cite journal |last1=Hughes |first1=Emma C. |last2=Edwards |first2=David P. |last3=Sayer |first3=Catherine A. |last4=Martin |first4=Philip A. |last5=Thomas |first5=Gavin H. |date=2020-05-05 |title=The effects of tropical secondary forest regeneration on avian phylogenetic diversity |url=http://dx.doi.org/10.1111/1365-2664.13639 |journal=Journal of Applied Ecology |volume=57 |issue=7 |pages=1351–1362 |doi=10.1111/1365-2664.13639 |bibcode=2020JApEc..57.1351H |issn=0021-8901|doi-access=free }}</ref> 

== Vocal behaviour ==
Its call consists of a series of rapid notes at a constant pitch; it starts loud and gets progressively louder.<ref name=":0">{{Cite journal |last1=Diamond |first1=Jared |last2=Bishop |first2=K. David |last3=Sneider |first3=Richard |date=2019-10-10 |title=An avifaunal double suture zone at the Bird's Neck Isthmus of New Guinea |url=http://dx.doi.org/10.1676/18-167 |journal=The Wilson Journal of Ornithology |volume=131 |issue=3 |pages=435 |doi=10.1676/18-167 |s2cid=204026687 |issn=1559-4491|url-access=subscription }}</ref>

== Subspecies ==

Source:<ref name=":0" />

* ''P. c. caerulescens''
* ''P. c. neumanni''
* ''P. c. nigricrissus''
* ''P. c. geislerorum''
